messages.text:
I didn't say anything bad, and I have nothing against it. 
I just said that I find it a bit unpleasant, that's all. 
You took my comment too critically. 
I will support you anyway if you need surgery)

messages.text: To be honest, I didn't understand anything of what you wrote

text_entities.text: To be honest, I didn't understand anything of what you wrote

messages.text: I am taking treatment and when you wrote I don't have to write to you anymore i thought you ask me politely to stop

text_entities.text: I am taking treatment and when you wrote I don't have to write to you anymore i thought you ask me politely to stop

messages.text: This was before we broke up and everything was fine. Why bring it up now?

text_entities.text: This was before we broke up and everything was fine. Why bring it up now?

messages.text: I wrote you this letter of support, but instead of being happy and accepting it, you remembered something bad. How strange...

text_entities.text: I wrote you this letter of support, but instead of being happy and accepting it, you remembered something bad. How strange...

messages.text: Honey be positive
And remember I have some painkillers

messages.text: I am getting better

Good morning, how are you today? 
Are you still in the hospital or already at home? 
I hope you're feeling even better today than yesterday ❤️
